# Security Report (Public Issue Placeholder)

⚠️ **Do NOT include any vulnerability details in this issue.**
This issue exists only to help initiate a coordinated private disclosure.

To report a vulnerability, follow the instructions in:

👉 **SECURITY.md**

You may also email:

📧 **security@ustaxcourt.gov**
(Please include: summary, impact, steps to reproduce, environment, and relevant logs with secrets removed.)

Once your private report is submitted, maintainers will respond through the private channel.
